summary: On April 4, 2026, the Rubicon Center reported 144 targets destroyed, including Ukrainian fixed-wing UAVs and UAV control points across the Donbas, Sumy, and Krasny Liman directions. In the Russian Federation, two "Yolka" air defense drones simultaneously intercepted an enemy fixed-wing UAV. On April 2, Ukrainian operators from the 1st Separate Special Operations Center, in coordination with the Defense Intelligence of Ukraine, struck a UAV storage facility, an aircraft, and a radar station in occupied Crimea, including a site storing Orion-type drones valued at over $5 million. In the Kostiantynivka direction, Ukrainian soldiers of the 36th Marine Brigade survived a Russian FPV drone attack, reportedly detecting the threat via a drone detector.
